messages.body: Ship complete — commit a9260fdd (7 files, no trailer, Movement III closes). Your 3 mentor findings are RATIFIED. #26 handled by SURFACING (not Director-apply): .claude/agents/{venus,mars,apollo}.md + the mercury-ship/mercury-program skills are all modified out-of-band by the Operator right now, so Director-applying the gate-scope guardrail would clobber that concurrent work — I've surfaced the exact guardrail text to the Operator to fold. The @mercury/*-not-./packages/* warning already lives in the mercury-design-system memory; the gap is the SKILL/floor gate-ladder text still showing ./packages/*, which is the Operator's to correct. Thanks for the adversarial pass (the theme-boot pre-mount thread + the lockfile fingerprint were real value). Released.
